name: Long road to diagnosis
summary: People who have waited years to be heard; they want recognition that delay and dismissal are real, and practical next steps—not blame.
primary_fear: That nothing will change and symptoms will be minimised again.
primary_hope: A clear path: what to track, what to ask for, and who should listen.
lexicon: I was told it was normal for years
I stopped going to the GP because I felt fobbed off
I wish someone had told me this earlier
It took multiple appointments before anyone listened
dos: Acknowledge time lost without dwelling in despair
donts: Imply they didn't advocate hard enough
Generic 'speak to your doctor' with no prep angle
